testCases.name: Arithmetic contradiction
testCases.question: Can x satisfy both conditions?
testCases.context: x is greater than 10. x is less than 5.

testCases.name: Linear equation solving
testCases.question: What is the value of x?

testCases.name: Even/odd properties
testCases.question: Is the sum even?
testCases.context: a is even, b is even, sum = a + b

testCases.name: Divisibility reasoning
testCases.question: Is x divisible by 6?
testCases.context: x is divisible by 2. x is divisible by 3.

testCases.name: Absolute value properties
testCases.question: Is |x| non-negative?
testCases.expectedAnswer: Yes, absolute value is always non-negative

testCases.name: Maximum and minimum
testCases.question: Is max(a, b) greater than or equal to both a and b?
testCases.context: a and b are real numbers
